messages.content: mental health includes emotional psychological and social well being it affects how we think feel and act good mental health involves coping with stress productive work healthy relationships and making good choices mental health problems include depression anxiety and bipolar disorder

high blood pressure or hypertension is when the force of blood against artery walls is consistently too high normal is below 120 over 80 and hypertension is 130 over 80 or higher it often has no symptoms but increases risk of heart disease stroke and kidney damage treatment includes lifestyle changes and medication

a balanced diet includes fruits vegetables whole grains lean proteins and healthy fats in appropriate proportions it provides essential nutrients vitamins and minerals while limiting excess sugar salt and saturated fat guidelines suggest filling half your plate with fruits and vegetables a quarter with grains and a quarter with protein

exercise benefits include stronger heart and lungs improved mood better sleep weight management reduced risk of chronic disease stronger bones and muscles sharper thinking and longer life even 30 minutes of moderate activity like brisk walking five days a week provides significant health benefits

immunity is the body defense system against infections and diseases the innate immune system provides general protection while the adaptive system creates specific responses and memory antibodies white blood cells complement proteins and the lymphatic system work together vaccination trains adaptive immunity to recognize specific pathogens

drinking water benefits include regulating body temperature lubricating joints protecting organs carrying nutrients and oxygen to cells flushing waste and maintaining healthy skin most adults need about 2 to 3 liters daily depending on activity climate and health conditions

improve sleep by keeping a consistent schedule creating a dark cool quiet bedroom avoiding screens before bed limiting caffeine after noon exercising regularly but not too close to bedtime and managing stress through relaxation techniques like deep breathing or meditation

prevent colds by washing hands frequently avoiding close contact with sick people getting enough sleep staying hydrated managing stress and maintaining a healthy diet rich in vitamins c and d regular exercise also strengthens the immune system
